name: Vision Release
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴィジョン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>解</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>放</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Vision HERO" Monster Card in your Spell & Trap Zone; Special Summon it. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Vision HERO" monster in your GY; add it to your hand.
eff: Target 1 "Vision HERO" Monster Card in your Spell & Trap Zone; Special Summon it. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Vision HERO" monster in your GY; add it to your hand.

summoning: Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
